text: The surgical team sets up the robotic port configuration, placing the transanal port while the patient is positioned in the prone jackknife position. A rigid proctoscopy reveals the fistula opening at seventeen centimeters, and the robot is docked parallel to the operating room table.
The surgeon identifies the lesion and uses a 2-0 absorbable self-locking suture to oversew it. The suturing is performed in a running fashion until the fistula opening is completely closed.
